---
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: listing-carousel
    template: carousel.ejs
    contents:
      - carousel/*.jpg
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
  - id: listing-carousel-caption
    template: carousel.ejs
    contents:
      - path: carousel/aaron-burden-0QnBA_xdZlQ-unsplash.jpg
        caption: "Aaron Burden"
      - path: carousel/alexey-elfimov-mY8Lt8cqOiI-unsplash.jpg
        caption: "Alexey Elfimov"
      - path: carousel/alexey-elfimov-vJJ5PtWymSY-unsplash.jpg
        caption: "Alexey Elfimov"
      - path: carousel/andrey-strizhkov-_71tdICMTzY-unsplash.jpg
        caption: "Andrey Strizhkov"
      - path: carousel/austris-augusts-i5SzUPuVgaY-unsplash.jpg
        caption: "Austris Augusts"
      - path: carousel/benjamin-chambon-coM7mp3tQwA-unsplash.jpg
        caption: "Benjamin Chambon"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
---

::: {#listing-carousel}
:::

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

::: {#listing-carousel-caption}
:::
